global_strategy: URGENT QUALITY ISSUES DETECTED: (1) 8/8 sampled files fail 3W Framework compliance - most missing 'Why' sections. (2) 7/8 files missing 'Learning Objectives' - critical for learning sequence. (3) 7/8 files missing 'Key Takeaways' - hurts knowledge retention. (4) REDUNDANCY: 'Allrun/Allclean' explanation duplicated 3x in 00_Overview.md. Git explanations appear in multiple files. (5) QUALITY SCORES: 04_ADVANCED_VISUALIZATION/00_Overview.md (15%), 05_PROFESSIONAL_PRACTICE/00_Overview.md (15%) need complete expansion - they're too brief. REFACTOR PRIORITY: (1) First, expand critically brief overview files (04, 05) to 20+ sections each with full 3W framework. (2) Add 'Learning Objectives' to all files - this is non-negotiable for educational content. (3) Consolidate redundant content (Git, Allrun explanations) into single authoritative location. (4) Add 'Why' sections to explain motivation - currently most files jump straight to 'What/How'. (5) Standardize structure: Learning Objectives → What → Why → How → Examples → Key Takeaways → Exercises.
